data.name: Balthilde

weaponImprint.name: Njörðr
weaponImprint.trait: After attacking an enemy target with defense less than or equal to 0, deals 1 point of fixed stability damage.
weaponImprint.effect: Allied units' damage dealt to targets with Defense type debuffs is increased by 10%. The user's physical summons' damage dealt and healing effects are increased by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Defense-type debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Girard Group units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects:
As a Doll, her first impression is that of someone impatient. She easily becomes irritable when communicating with others, especially after being misunderstood. Her irritation becomes even more pronounced, to the point of being flustered and getting stuck on details. But in reality, this is simply because she's not good at expressing herself. Upon getting to know her better, one can discover her serious and meticulous nature, and her rigorous attitude toward work.
"...Keep smiling, don't let your gaze be too fierce, keep smiling... Do I still look too serious? I'm still learning how to smile, have a little patience."

skills.name: Cryoshatter Strike
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Disassembly Knack
skills.description: Launches 1 attack against the nearest enemy target within 3 tiles, dealing targeted Physical damage equal to 100% of defense, and 3 points of stability damage. 2 attacks can be made per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Launches 1 attack against the nearest enemy target within 5 tiles, dealing targeted Physical damage equal to 100% of defense, 3 points of stability damage, and applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns. 2 attacks can be made per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Launches 1 attack against the nearest enemy target within 5 tiles, dealing targeted Physical damage equal to 100% of defense, 3 points of stability damage, and applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns. 3 attacks can be made per turn.

summon.name: Offense Construct
summon.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 100% of Balthilde's initial max HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 80% of her initial defense. Can deal damage to the nearest enemy unit within 3 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The range of the Offense Construct's basic attack [skillsummon:2f2d25c4-9afb-42dd-ad92-9c1a1f04146c] is expanded to 5 tiles, and targets gain [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

Offense Construct gains a new passive skill, Additional Modifications. Upon spawning, deals 4 points of stability damage to enemy targets within 5 tiles and applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The skill cooldown is reduced by 1 turn. The attack and defense inheritance of Offense Construct is increased to 100%.

The number of basic attacks Offense Construct can make is increased by 1.

skills.name: Additional Modifications
skills.description:
Upon spawning, deals 4 points of stability damage to all enemy units within 5 tiles and applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

Note: This skill is inactive until V1.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Upon spawning, deals 4 points of stability damage to all enemy units within 5 tiles and applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

summon.name: Offense Construct
summon.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 100% of Balthilde's initial max HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 80% of her initial defense. Can deal damage to the nearest enemy unit within 3 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The range of the Offense Construct's basic attack [skillsummon:2f2d25c4-9afb-42dd-ad92-9c1a1f04146c] is expanded to 5 tiles, and targets gain [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

Offense Construct gains a new passive skill, Additional Modifications. Upon spawning, deals 4 points of stability damage to enemy targets within 5 tiles and applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

skills.name: Focused Maintenance
skills.description: Cover within 3 tiles will not lose durability and allied units within range who cannot benefit from cover damage reduction take 30% less damage.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Cover within 5 tiles will not lose durability and allied units within range who cannot benefit from cover damage reduction take 30% less damage. If an allied unit ends its action within 5 tiles, they recover HP equal to 100% of defense and 2 points of stability, and gains [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Cover within 5 tiles will not lose durability and allied units within range take 30% less damage. If an allied unit ends its action within 5 tiles, they recover HP equal to 100% of defense and 2 points of stability, and gains [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] for 2 turns.

summon.name: Defense Construct
summon.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 100% of Balthilde's initial max HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 80% of her initial defense. Can protect allied units and cover within 3 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The range of Defense Construct's skills is increased to 5 tiles.

The passive skill Focused Maintenance gains a new effect: Allied units which end their action within 5 tiles of this unit recover HP equal to 100% of defense, 2 points of stability, and gains [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] for 2 turns.

The passive skill Safety Consciousness gains a new effect: Upon summon, it restores the durability of all Cover within 5 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The skill cooldown is reduced by 1 turn. The attack and defense inheritance of Defense Construct is increased to 100%.

The effectiveness of the passive skill Safety Consciousness is increased. Upon summon, the HP recovery multiplier is increased to 200% and stability recovery is increased to 4 points.

The effectiveness of the passive skill Focused Maintenance is increased. It is no longer limited to allied units who cannot benefit from cover; damage taken by all allied units within range is reduced by 30%.

skills.name: Safety Consciousness
skills.description: Upon spawning, applies [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] to all allied units within 3 tiles for 2 turns and they are healed for 100% of defense.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Upon spawning, applies [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] to all allied units within 5 tiles for 2 turns, heals them for 100% of defense, and restores durability for all cover within the area of effect.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Upon spawning, applies [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] to all allied units within 5 tiles for 2 turns, heals them for 200% of defense and 4 points of stability, and restores durability for all cover within the area of effect.

summon.name: Defense Construct
summon.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 100% of Balthilde's initial max HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 80% of her initial defense. Can protect allied units and cover within 3 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The range of Defense Construct's skills is increased to 5 tiles.

The passive skill Focused Maintenance gains a new effect: Allied units which end their action within 5 tiles of this unit recover HP equal to 100% of defense, 2 points of stability, and gains [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] for 2 turns.

The passive skill Safety Consciousness gains a new effect: Upon summon, it restores the durability of all Cover within 5 tiles.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The skill cooldown is reduced by 1 turn. The attack and defense inheritance of Defense Construct is increased to 100%.

The effectiveness of the passive skill Safety Consciousness is increased. Upon summon, the HP recovery multiplier is increased to 200% and stability recovery is increased to 4 points.

The effectiveness of the passive skill Focused Maintenance is increased. It is no longer limited to allied units who cannot benefit from cover; damage taken by all allied units within range is reduced by 30%.

skills.name: Wrench Calibration
skills.description: After launching a basic attack, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When an allied unit (excluding Balthilde) performs an active skill that deals Physical damage, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Up to 2 points of Confectance Index can be gained per turn. For every 1 point of Confectance Index gained, applies 1 stack of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] to all Constructs. If a Construct with 10 stacks of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] is destroyed, enemy targets within 3 tiles take Physical damage equal to 100% of the Construct's defense (does not trigger [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], or [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622]).
skills.descriptionLevel2: After launching a basic attack, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When an allied unit (excluding Balthilde) performs an active skill that deals Physical damage, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Up to 2 points of Confectance Index can be gained per turn. For every 1 point of Confectance Index gained, applies 1 stack of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] to all Constructs. If a Construct with 10 stacks of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] is destroyed, enemy targets within 3 tiles take Physical damage equal to 100% of the Construct's defense (does not trigger [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], or [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622]). The damage multiplier of the basic attack Cryoshatter Strike is increased by 5% for each point of Confectance Index Balthilde has.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The damage multiplier of the basic attack Cryoshatter Strike is increased for each point of Confectance Index Balthilde has. The effects of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] is enhanced, with attack and defense both increased by 5%.

skills.name: Reinforcement Protocol
skills.description:
Selects an empty tile within 8 tiles and summons a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa]. If a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] exists, teleports it to the selected tile instead. If the active skill Demolition Protocol was not used this turn, Balthilde can use Demolition Protocol once.

After the [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] is destroyed, the skill enters into a 3 turn cooldown.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Selects an empty tile within 8 tiles and summons a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa]. If a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] exists, teleports it to the selected tile instead. If the active skill Demolition Protocol was not used this turn, Balthilde can use Demolition Protocol once.

After the [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] is destroyed, the skill enters into a 2 turn cooldown.

skills.name: Raging Chainblast
skills.description:
Selects 1 direction and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy units in a 6-tile cone shaped area in the selected direction.
The cooldown of the active skill Reinforcement Protocol and the active skill Demolition Protocol are reduced by 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 direction and deals AoE Physical damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets within a 11x6 area in the selected direction. Restores HP equal to 100% of attack to all allied units and applies [effect:5ed71f31-7524-4e38-8dd3-4c3ef8011bff] for 2 turns.
Decreases the cooldown of Fortification Protocol and Demolition Protocol by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Resets the cooldown of the active skill Reinforcement Protocol and the active skill Demolition Protocol after usage of this skill. Restores HP equal to 100% of attack to all allied units and applies [effect:5ed71f31-7524-4e38-8dd3-4c3ef8011bff] for 2 turns.

keys.effect: Increase defense for the holder's [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] by 7%.
Before using an active attack, applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990|doll:balthilde] on the enemy for 2 turns.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 1 - Cannot Spit It Out

keys.effect: Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
At the end of action, applies [effect:fbd44ec2-ad9a-47c6-8b5d-374a1dcf0b96] for all allies on the battlefield without nearby cover for 1 turn.
At the end of the action, restores 3 points of stability for the ally with the lowest stability.
Before an allied unit is attacked, [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] restores 1 point of stability to them.
When there are Constructs on the battlefield, Balthilde's stability damage dealt by is increased by 3 points.

vertebrae.effect:
The range of the Offense Construct's basic attack [skillsummon:2f2d25c4-9afb-42dd-ad92-9c1a1f04146c] is expanded to 5 tiles, and targets gain [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

Offense Construct gains a new passive skill, Additional Modifications. Upon spawning, deals 4 points of stability damage to enemy targets within 5 tiles and applies [effect:fb3c3c78-49c8-47d7-b732-49069cf4a990] for 2 turns.

doll.name: Balthilde
doll.effects:
As a Doll, her first impression is that of someone impatient. She easily becomes irritable when communicating with others, especially after being misunderstood. Her irritation becomes even more pronounced, to the point of being flustered and getting stuck on details. But in reality, this is simply because she's not good at expressing herself. Upon getting to know her better, one can discover her serious and meticulous nature, and her rigorous attitude toward work.
"...Keep smiling, don't let your gaze be too fierce, keep smiling... Do I still look too serious? I'm still learning how to smile, have a little patience."

The effectiveness of the passive skill Focused Maintenance is increased. It is no longer limited to allied units who cannot benefit from cover; damage taken by all allied units within range is reduced by 30%.

doll.name: Balthilde
doll.effects:
As a Doll, her first impression is that of someone impatient. She easily becomes irritable when communicating with others, especially after being misunderstood. Her irritation becomes even more pronounced, to the point of being flustered and getting stuck on details. But in reality, this is simply because she's not good at expressing herself. Upon getting to know her better, one can discover her serious and meticulous nature, and her rigorous attitude toward work.
"...Keep smiling, don't let your gaze be too fierce, keep smiling... Do I still look too serious? I'm still learning how to smile, have a little patience."

skillsLevel3.name: Focused Maintenance
skillsLevel3.description: Cover within 3 tiles will not lose durability and allied units within range who cannot benefit from cover damage reduction take 30% less damage.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2: Cover within 5 tiles will not lose durability and allied units within range who cannot benefit from cover damage reduction take 30% less damage. If an allied unit ends its action within 5 tiles, they recover HP equal to 100% of defense and 2 points of stability, and gains [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] for 2 turns.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Cover within 5 tiles will not lose durability and allied units within range take 30% less damage. If an allied unit ends its action within 5 tiles, they recover HP equal to 100% of defense and 2 points of stability, and gains [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] for 2 turns.

skillsLevel3.name: Safety Consciousness
skillsLevel3.description: Upon spawning, applies [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] to all allied units within 3 tiles for 2 turns and they are healed for 100% of defense.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2: Upon spawning, applies [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] to all allied units within 5 tiles for 2 turns, heals them for 100% of defense, and restores durability for all cover within the area of effect.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Upon spawning, applies [effect:67f08088-4326-4711-a4eb-fda93220f156] to all allied units within 5 tiles for 2 turns, heals them for 200% of defense and 4 points of stability, and restores durability for all cover within the area of effect.

skillsLevel3.name: Reinforcement Protocol
skillsLevel3.description:
Selects an empty tile within 8 tiles and summons a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa]. If a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] exists, teleports it to the selected tile instead. If the active skill Demolition Protocol was not used this turn, Balthilde can use Demolition Protocol once.

After the [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] is destroyed, the skill enters into a 3 turn cooldown.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
Selects an empty tile within 8 tiles and summons a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa]. If a [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] exists, teleports it to the selected tile instead. If the active skill Demolition Protocol was not used this turn, Balthilde can use Demolition Protocol once.

After the [summon:61b0aa09-37a4-45b1-8702-c0949369a8aa] is destroyed, the skill enters into a 2 turn cooldown.

summonsLevel3.name: Defense Construct
summonsLevel3.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 100% of Balthilde's initial max HP, 80% of her initial attack, and 80% of her initial defense. Can protect allied units and cover within 3 tiles.

vertebrae.effect: The damage multiplier of the basic attack Cryoshatter Strike is increased for each point of Confectance Index Balthilde has. The effects of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] is enhanced, with attack and defense both increased by 5%.

doll.name: Balthilde
doll.effects:
As a Doll, her first impression is that of someone impatient. She easily becomes irritable when communicating with others, especially after being misunderstood. Her irritation becomes even more pronounced, to the point of being flustered and getting stuck on details. But in reality, this is simply because she's not good at expressing herself. Upon getting to know her better, one can discover her serious and meticulous nature, and her rigorous attitude toward work.
"...Keep smiling, don't let your gaze be too fierce, keep smiling... Do I still look too serious? I'm still learning how to smile, have a little patience."

skillsLevel2.name: Wrench Calibration
skillsLevel2.description: After launching a basic attack, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When an allied unit (excluding Balthilde) performs an active skill that deals Physical damage, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Up to 2 points of Confectance Index can be gained per turn. For every 1 point of Confectance Index gained, applies 1 stack of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] to all Constructs. If a Construct with 10 stacks of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] is destroyed, enemy targets within 3 tiles take Physical damage equal to 100% of the Construct's defense (does not trigger [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], or [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622]).
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2: After launching a basic attack, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. When an allied unit (excluding Balthilde) performs an active skill that deals Physical damage, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. Up to 2 points of Confectance Index can be gained per turn. For every 1 point of Confectance Index gained, applies 1 stack of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] to all Constructs. If a Construct with 10 stacks of [effect:c2505ba5-ac86-4b68-a18b-8a8fd591ae61] is destroyed, enemy targets within 3 tiles take Physical damage equal to 100% of the Construct's defense (does not trigger [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], [effect:013c5bd7-5fbe-4337-8f26-70872d9a5800], or [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622]). The damage multiplier of the basic attack Cryoshatter Strike is increased by 5% for each point of Confectance Index Balthilde has.

imagoforms.effect: When this unit's [effect:d149d223-ac66-4556-ba25-5d4fef2504e9] are on the field, allied units' defense is increased by 5%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest defense have their defense increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Increases Defense by 30% and decreases Stability damage received by 2 points. At the end of the action, if the buff holder's HP is below 40%, restores HP equal to 50% of Balthilde's Attack. This is considered as a buff.
Attack and Defense are increased by 3%. This buff can be stacked up to 10 times and cannot be cleansed.
Stability damage taken is increased by 2 points and stability damage dealt is reduced by 2 points. Considered a defense debuff.
